_fixture_notes: Case 1: Recipe with no ingredient groups. Every ingredient has group: null and every step has group: null. Tests that ungrouped recipes pass validation without group-coordination errors and that the cooking-mode UI handles a single un-sectioned method.
name: Quick Tomato & Red Lentil Soup
description: A flat, ungrouped soup recipe used as a no-groups validation fixture.

steps.title: Soften the aromatics
steps.content: Heat {0001} in a saucepan over medium heat. Add {0002} and cook for 5 minutes until softened, then stir in {0003} and cook for another minute until fragrant.

steps.title: Add lentils, tomatoes and stock
steps.content: Stir in {0004}, {0005}, {0006} and {0007}. Bring to a gentle simmer over medium-high heat.

steps.title: Simmer until thickened
steps.content: Simmer uncovered for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the lentils have broken down and the soup has thickened to your liking. Season with {0008} and adjust to taste before serving.

notes: Blend with a stick blender for a smooth finish if preferred. Keeps in the fridge for up to 3 days and freezes well in portions.
